rulings.Case Title: RODRIGO LOPEZ VS. ALTAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment, Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 4, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS ATLAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC., 1830 ALEMANY, LLC and YOSEF TAHBAZOF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is continued to July 8, 2021 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: TONY GARNICKI ET AL VS. ANCHOR LOANS LP, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-584439, CGC-20-584440, CUD-20-667549, CUD-20-667550, CUD-20-667551 WITH CASE CGC-20-584236
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 4, 2021 line 2. PLAINTIFFS TONY GARNICKI, OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND LLC and SANCHEZ RE, LLC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-584439, CGC-20-584440, CUD-20-667549, CUD-20-667550, CUD-20-667551 WITH CASE CGC-20-584236 is continued to June 10, 2021 for JRM Financial to file proofs of service for declarations filed in cases 667549 and 667551. (The Court notes that declarations were filed int cases 667549 and 667551 and there was no declaration filed for 667550). Proofs of Service for May 21, 2021 declarations on or about May 21, 2021 to be filed and served no later than June 4, 2021 by 9:00 a.m. No further filings in the Unlawful detainer actions subject to this motion (except for the above-mentioned proofs of service) are permitted until noon on June 10, 2021. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC VS. MICHAEL DEL GROSSO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Maintaining Restricted Access To The Court Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 4, 2021 line 5. PLAINTIFF MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC'S Notice Of Motion For Order Maintaining Restricted Access To The Court Record is DENIED without prejudice. The matter continued to be restricted per CCP 1161.2, judgment having been entered more than 60 days after the filing of the complaint, and there is no indication in the moving papers as to the reason for additional restriction. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 4, 2021 line 6. DEFENDANT CESAR ANGOBALDO'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
